title: Tin Ores and Crafts
description: Add tin ore in the minecraft world and their craftings
body:
# **Tin Ores and Crafts**
Add tin ores in the minecraft world and their craftings

## **This mod adds:**
- **_Items_** (Tin Ingot, Raw Tin, Tin Nugget)
- **_Tools_** (Tin Sword, Tin Pickaxe, Tin Axe, Tin Shovel, Tin Hoe)
- **_Blocks_** (Raw Tin Block, Tin Block, Tin ore Block, Tin Door, Tin Trapdoor)
- **_Armor_** (Tin Helmet, Tin Chestplate, Tin Leggings, Tin Boots)
- **_Armor Trims - Armor Material_**

## **Compatible with Other Mods (Compatible Tags 1.21.3):**
- **_[All The Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/allthetrims)_**
- **_[Better trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettertrims)_**
